title: Enchanted Maces
description: This is a PvP or Aesthetic Resource Pack that adds enchantments to maces if they have Breach, Density, or Wind Burst.
body:
This is a texture pack made by Arkstius. This pack has 3 textures, each of the exclusive mace enchantments has their own textures

Currently only made for 1.21.1 but it will probably work on other versions

if you would like a certain version I can try to update it for that version
